====Pokémon====
This listing is of Kabu's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|HZ}}:

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Kabu

|desc={{p|Centiskorch}} is Kabu's only known Pokémon. He used it in a [[Multi Battle]] against [[Liko]] and [[Roy]], teaming up with {{OBP|Wakaba|HZ020}}'s {{p|Rolycoly}}. Centiskorch ended up defeating [[Roy's Fuecoco]] before withdrawing from the battle.

Centiskorch's known moves are {{m|Flame Wheel}}, {{m|Bug Bite}}, and {{m|Flamethrower}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Flash Fire}}.}}
